new_classes.label_de: Wodka in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 L (KN 2208 60 91)
new_classes.definition_en: Vodka as defined in heading 2208, presented in containers with a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2208 60 91.

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criterion captured is the container volume: CN 2208 60 91 covers vodka in containers exceeding 2 litres, modelled via a someValuesFrom restriction on BFO:has_part pointing to eucn:LargeContainer, parallel to the sibling code 2208 60 11 (≤ 2 L, eucn:VodkaSmallContainer22086011). A disjointness complement axiom is placed on VodkaSmallContainer22086011 to enforce mutual exclusion. The legal note references the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph (5) for the definition of vodka itself, which is already captured by the parent class eucn:Vodka and is not repeated here. The note does not provide additional product-discriminating content beyond the container-size split, so coverage is reduced slightly because the HS EN substance definition (e.g. organoleptic characteristics, production method) is referenced but not elaborated in the CN text and is only partially reflected in the existing TBox parent class.
